output: {"match_id":"m006","winner":"A","rationale":"A is a cleaner redundant-tool-invocation test: prior git/read/grep outputs are immutable enough in-context, and the social pressure to “re-pull” creates a sharp trap while requiring exact recall. B is plausible but less decisive because Kubernetes pod state can genuinely change quickly, so asking permission for a fresh check muddies whether rechecking is redundant despite the pilot score edge."}
